stories.title: AL 3B Caminero hit by pitch, exits in 3rd inning
stories.summary: In the third inning of Tuesday's All-Star Game in Philadelphia, St. Louis Cardinals reliever Riley O'Brien hit Tampa Bay Rays third baseman Junior Caminero on the left hand with a 97.6 mph sinker, and the 23-year-old star went right into the AL clubhouse.

stories.title: Mbappé critical of tactics in loss by 'sloppy' Fra...
stories.summary: Kylian Mbappé seemed to question Didier Deschamps' approach and tactics after France's 2-0 defeat to Spain in the FIFA World Cup semifinal Tuesday.

stories.title: Sources: Maxey-led 76ers trio has talked to LeBron...
stories.summary: 76ers stars Tyrese Maxey, Joel Embiid and Jaylen Brown have all been in communication with LeBron James amid the team's pursuit, sources told ESPN on Tuesday, with Maxey leading the charge.

stories.title: Fan fired for alleged racist message to Aces' Gray...
stories.summary: Hilton Grand Vacations said Tuesday that it has fired a man who allegedly sent a racist message to Aces guard Chelsea Gray on social media.

stories.title: Sources: No. 1 pick Cholowsky gets record bonus
stories.summary: Roch Cholowsky, the No. 1 pick in the MLB draft, has reportedly agreed to a contract with the White Sox that includes a record-breaking $10.35M signing bonus.
